feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Love Me (Not Too Hard)
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 105,719Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 344

Summary: It was a shitshow, to say the least. Despite, what he’d told Bobby all those months ago, he did not have a handle on the problem. He had the opposite. He had zero handles, and he was too embarrassed to bring it up. It was definitely an issue, but it wasn’t too serious. And it didn’t affect anybody besides himself. But it was definitely affecting him in a bad way. Hard day at work? Go have sex to feel better. Bobby yell at him for screwing up again? Find an old guy to tell him he’s good for something. See a happy family on a call and remember he hasn’t spoken to Maddie in seven years? Blackout so he doesn’t have to be reminded of that gaping wound. It was really bad. Yeah. But like, privately bad. Secretly bad. Except for his roommates, who were starting to get pissed about him stumbling around drunk with his guests. So, he started to look for a new apartment in earnest. And just when he was starting to think things were getting actually concerning, and pretty soon he wouldn’t even remember what the point of anything was, who walked into the fire station, looking perfect and attractive and ready to change Buck’s life? Eddie fucking Diaz.   or: Buck's sex addiction taken seriously.

entry.title: Locard’s Exchange Principle
entry.summary:
Author: thisisclauds

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,838Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: In the early 20th century, a French criminologist named Dr Edmond Locard established one of the main basic principles of forensic science, known as Locard’s exchange principle.Every contact leaves a trace.Buck likes to think that the principle doesn’t just apply to forensic science. It also applies to life.

entry.title: Lost and Found-The TRUE story about Evan Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Bellaromanza

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 116,203Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 289

Summary: Buck always felt like he didn't belong.Little did he know he belonged to two dynasties, and the truth will change his life in the best of ways.Also, Christopher is the best part of Eddie's mess.

entry.title: curb appeal
entry.summary:
Author: stillmercy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,639Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 176

Summary: Then, Eddie straightens up and turns around, and Buck revises his assessment, because the front is cropped too. Evenly, which means a person did this on purpose. The express purpose being to ruin Buck’s day and possibly his life. The shirt stops right under his ribs. His stomach is just — out, the whole deliciously muscular span of it. “Hey,” Eddie says, a crooked, boyish grin splitting across his face, as if he isn’t standing in his own driveway basically naked. “Wasn’t expecting you.” “I-I, uh, texted. You weren’t answering.” “Phone’s inside.” Eddie tips his head at the engine. “She’s leaking somewhere. Been out here since this morning trying to find it.” He swipes the back of his wrist across his forehead, and the gesture pulls the hem up another half inch. Which is how he ends up looking at the sweatpants again. And the sweatpants, it turns out, are keeping no secrets. There is nothing on under there. So now he’s standing on Eddie’s front lawn, stone-cold sober, at four in the afternoon, looking at the unmistakable outline of his best friend going commando. Neat. Or: Eddie wears a crop top. Buck sucks his dick about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: 'Cause You Love Somebody
entry.summary:
Author: love_me_anyway_118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,371Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 61

Summary: Buck would do anything for Theo, especially adopting him. It wasn't an easy path but Buck was willing. The problem was that Theo had been thorough a lot in a short amount of time and he needed stability in his life right now, which meant two parents and preferably a kid. That wasn't Bucks strong suit. But it was Eddie's.

entry.title: i wanna see you lose it (i wanna hear you say it)
entry.summary:
Author: Shrimpkle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,790Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: "It’s only then does he see all the missed calls from Buck. He falls to his knees, the wood hitting his shin in a burst of pain that is barely registered. The phone drops from his hand onto the floor. It bounces a foot away from him but it feels like its oceans away. His vision narrows as sensation floods back into his body, going from dissociated to painfully conscious in an instant. The something drops like lead in his stomach as the screen of his phone lights up again. Buck is calling him. Again. His chest squeezes painfully. He wishes it wouldn’t. A choice between Christopher and Buck shouldn’t even be a choice at all. He doesn’t understand why a chasm opens at the bottom of his stomach like a black hole that sucks everything in."   Or: Repressed emotions, even unrecognized ones, bubble up to the surface eventually.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: FRACTURES AND FOUNDATIONS
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,500Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 6

Summary: "Okay," Buck breathed, the word a surrender. "But no shady motels. I’m old now, Eddie. I tire easily. I don’t think my back can handle those barely-there mattresses." He joked, swallowing the words he truly wanted to say: I don’t want to be your secret forever."It's okay, old man," Eddie whispered, pressing his forehead against Buck’s. "Only fine silks and fancy mattresses from here on."Inside, as if reading Buck’s mind he replied: I will make it right. Just give me time. We won't always be a secret.or;10yrs before the 118, Eddie and Buck had met and started a secret affair under false names while in serious relationships.it all comes crushing down when Buck gets into an accident and gets amnesia.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Monsoon Season
entry.summary:
Author: pinkpanther1970

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,827Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 17

Summary: "Eddie thinks about Pangea, the slow inevitable drift as tectonic plates shifted and new continents emerged. It’s absurd. People are not land masses. They don’t just drift apart like continents or icebergs in the ocean. There was nothing fateful in Eddie and Buck’s dissolve, nothing to do with destiny or the universe. It was simple manmade destruction. Did he stop picking up the phone? Or did Buck stop calling? It was Eddie who stopped responding to texts. There’s evidence, a whole damning record he can scroll through. Maybe if he were brave enough, he’d be able to work it out. Pick apart their conversations, find the cracks, identify the point where they started slipping away from each other. Eddie is not brave enough."   or the Diazes never move back to LA, Eddie lives his best gay life in El Paso, and Buck refuses to stop haunting the narrative

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Calling (It's a Choice)
entry.summary:
Author: Will_of_Alexander

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,257Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 197

Summary: Ever since the Diaz boys moved to El Paso, Buck has been estranged from their lives. Eddie first, and then Christopher. He's lived a lot since then. Gotten married, had a kid, gotten divorced. But the second his phone rings with the name "Chris 🦖" Buck knows something is wrong. Will he take the call? Will it become his calling? Does he even have a choice?

entry.title: Truths, Toddlers and Tribulations
entry.summary:
Author: MagnificentMegan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,441Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 145

Summary: If you were to ask Buck, he would say that he had a pretty good handle on this parenting thing. In fact, it was easier than he expected. Everyone would tell him that he was dumb to think that, but he didn't think so. Theo was happy, healthy and full of life so Buck would say that he was acing this.That is until he hears the words that no parent wants to hear - at 6 am in the morning, on the day he's supposed to go back to work. "I frew up" Shit. Featuring helicopter dad Buck, supportive, oblivious and Whipped Eddie Diaz, and the rest of the Fire Fam & co. who all can't believe that these two idiots are still not together.

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 944,233Chapters: 94/?Kudos: 130

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 691,224Chapters: 87/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Athena Grant/Bobby Nash

entry.title: And Breathe (Just Breathe)
entry.summary:
Author: Salve_El_Atun

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,284Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: Buck and Eddie have always been two sides of the same wounded coin —one desperately begging to be chosen while running before he can be left behind, the other running away in search of a place where he can finally be himself without shame.After years of holding their breath, life brings them together at the 118. What starts as partnership slowly becomes something deeper: the safest place either of them has ever known. Who would have thought the universe sent Eddie Diaz to teach Buck how to stay —and that Buck would be the one to finally help Eddie learn how to breathe? This story is inspired by "Just Breathe" by Anna Nalick.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Light of Day
entry.summary:
Author: semperama

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,230Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 116

Summary: It isn’t supposed to feel like this. Even after everything, his whole life, all the people who have left, the expanse of empty sheets in the morning a familiar sight—even after all that, Buck is still a romantic, deep down. He still thought if you found someone who stuck around for years, and you let them in and let them see the real you, and then they kissed you and took you to bed, then that was it, the happily ever after. At the very least they’d be there in the morning.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Angst with a Happy Ending
  • Love Confessions

entry.title: I Don't Think It's Very Strange (For Me to Be in Love With You)
entry.summary:
Author: funnyfeelingbuckley

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,284Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 27

Summary: “Hear me out,” The man puts his hands out as a gesture of good faith, “This isn’t a prank. Well, maybe it is a prank…” Buck narrows his eyes and crosses his arms over his mostly bare pecs; the only thing covering his upper half is two suspenders. Buck, feeling a bit exposed and rather embarrassed, puffs out his chest in an attempt to intimidate. He watches as the man’s eyes roam over the broad expanse of his shoulders, and then to his biceps, and then back up to Buck’s face. The man licks his lips. Oh. “This isn’t that kind of prank,” The man manages, his voice tight. - or, Pretty Woman AU   title based on the song Show Me Your Soul by the Red Hot Chili Peppers, as found on the Pretty Woman soundtrack

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
